text:
78.3 million people in communities about communication, listening, and being present with the people they love.

zero daily habit apps for any of them.

prayer apps exist. meditation apps exist. fitness apps exist.

nobody built the app that helps you show up better for your family every day.

we're working on it.

couples streak. parenting streak. active listening streak.

the spiritual disciplines aren't just prayer and scripture. they're patience. presence. compassion in practice.

love is a habit. kindness is a streak. forgiveness is a discipline.

building tools for the habits that matter most.

ramadan day 21.

the consistency compounds. the discipline deepens. the streak is not a number on a screen. it's who you become through repetition.

hilal and prayerlock are still live. still free. still serving.

9 days remain. finish strong.
